message:
Running command: DESIGN_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
# Check if there's an nc_chipgen verify command in any of the nc tools
find /nc -name "*.py" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "subcommand\|verify\|subparser" 2>/dev/null | grep -v ipm | head -20
echo "---"
# Check if nc_socgen has verify
ls /nc/apps/nc_socgen/nc_socgen/ | head -20
